item.description:
Location: Lagos
Description:

A Health and Safety Environment (HSE) Manager is sought to provide strategic leadership in managing operational risks and ensuring regulatory compliance across various business units including dredging, marine engineering, and offshore operations. The role requires a minimum of 5-7 years of experience in HSE management, a Bachelor's degree in a related field, and professional HSE certifications. Responsibilities include developing and implementing HSE policies, conducting audits, leading incident investigations, and advising management on safety culture. Frequent travel to project sites across Nigeria is expected.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] HSE Manager Job - Offshore Operations at Japaul Oil & Maritime Services Plc.

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Experienced Master, Chief Engineer, AB, Mechanic, Motorman, Crane Operator, Welder, and Fitter are sought for Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barges operating on a Saudi Aramco project. A minimum of 2-5 years of rank experience on similar vessels is required, along with valid documents for 12-14 months. Candidates must not hold a valid KSA visa. Salary is negotiable. Applications are being accepted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Engineer Jobs on Jack-Up Barges (Saudi Aramco) at Aavishka Shipping Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Multiple offshore positions are available for candidates with mandatory experience on offshore barges or marine vessels. The contract offers a rotation of 150 days on and 43 days off. Benefits include free food, accommodation, and transportation. A minimum of 3-5 years of Gulf experience in offshore operations is required. Attractive salary and overtime are provided. Client face-to-face interviews will be held in Mumbai on July 19th and 20th.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Job Vacancies - Chargehand Mechanic, Oiler, Electrician at Libra International Services

item.description:
Location: Navi Mumbai
Description:

A Senior Geologist is sought for offshore and nearshore geotechnical investigations. The role involves leading field investigations, managing site teams, and liaising with clients and marine logistics. A postgraduate degree in Geology or Applied Geology and 1-3 years of relevant experience, including offshore/nearshore geotechnical exposure, are required. Willingness to travel and stay at marine sites is essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sr. Geologist Job - Offshore Investigations at Renuka Consultants HR

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Immediate hiring for experienced offshore professionals in the UAE. Open positions include Roustabout and Floorman. Mandatory offshore experience is required, with preference for candidates with experience in Offshore Barges, Offshore Production, Marine Vessels, Dockyards, or Shipyard Projects. Benefits include immediate departure, free food, and accommodation. Face-to-face interviews will be held in Chennai on July 17, 2026, and in Mumbai on July 19-20, 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Job Opportunity - Roustabout Floorman at NMDC Energy

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

Immediate offshore project opportunities are available in Saudi Arabia for various roles including Rig Manager, Operations Engineer, OIM, Toolpusher, Chief Mechanic, Chief Electrician, QHSE Advisor, Barge Master, Driller, Mechanic, Electrician, and Materialman. Rotations are 28/28 or 60/30. Previous offshore drilling experience, valid offshore certifications, and availability for mobilisation are required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Project Opportunities in Saudi Arabia at Velesto

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi, UAE
Description:

A shore-based Port Captain / Marine Superintendent is required for offshore marine operations in Abu Dhabi, UAE. This permanent role involves providing marine assurance and operational support for a fleet including DP vessels, survey vessels, and workboats. Responsibilities include ensuring compliance with international maritime regulations, coordinating with port authorities, and conducting risk assessments. The position requires over 10 years of maritime work experience.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Port Captain / Marine Superintendent Job - Offshore Fleet at Black & Grey HR

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced Roustabouts and Floormen are sought for offshore roles in the UAE. Mandatory offshore experience is required, preferably within offshore barges, production, marine vessels, dockyards, or shipyard projects. Immediate departure is available, with free food and accommodation provided. This is a free recruitment opportunity.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Roustabout Job - UAE Offshore at NMDC Energy

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi, UAE
Description:

Experienced Senior PSV Technicians are sought for a reputable company in Abu Dhabi, UAE. This role involves Pressure Safety Valve (PSV) testing, calibration, servicing, and repair. The position offers a monthly salary of AED 5,235, with a 28/28 rotation. Benefits include leave salary, air tickets for each rotation, and free food, accommodation, and transportation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Senior PSV Technician Job - Abu Dhabi at DFS CONSULTANCY SERVICES

item.description:
Location: India to UAE
Description:

An experienced ASD Tug Master with ocean-going towing experience and a valid FG Master COC is sought for an offshore vacancy. The position involves towing operations between India and the UAE. Direct recruitment is offered with no subagents or middlemen involved.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Tug Master Job - Offshore Towing Operations at Jesseena Human Resources
